case_title: ERIC ROBINSON VS. OAKLEY, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ERIC ROBINSON FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-15-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-04-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-15-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Eric Robinson is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAR-15-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Dec-15-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Continued To Sep-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
